For a truly compelling villain, consider **Kaelith Vorn**, a sorceress who once walked among the stars, her magic a beacon of hope. But she saw the world as a broken thing, a realm of chaos and strife. She sought to unite all magic into one perfect force, a singular power that would bring order to the world. She found the forbidden spell, the *Covenant of the Unbound*, and with it, she became a force of destruction. Now, she dwells in the shadowed citadel of **Vorthalas**, a place where the air is thick with the stench of decay and the walls pulse with the energy of a thousand lost souls. Her form is a grotesque fusion of flesh and stone, a reminder of the price of ambition. She is not a monster, but a savior, a figure who sees the world as it is—broken, and she is the only one who can fix it. But in her quest for power, she has lost her soul, and in doing so, she has become the very thing she sought to destroy.
